verse.name: v1
verse.lines: It's not by might, it's not by power It's not by anything we've done, but what God can do This is our house, this is our Father's house Its walls are broken down, the temple of God

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: So let us arise today, arise today Let us arise today and rebuild Jeru.. uu.. salem

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Build back those gates, restore those places Till our Father's holy house is spotless again Pick up those stones, mend those breaches Let's fortify the house of our Father again
